title: epidendrum × gransabanense
intro: Epidendrum × gransabanense is an interspecific hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Epidendrum secundum and Epidendrum radicans. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Epidendrum × gransabanense is prepared as a tea or tincture by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin.
